00009 #include <types.h>
00010 #include <kern/errno.h>
00011 #include <kern/reboot.h>
00012 #include <kern/unistd.h>
00013 #include <lib.h>
00014 #include <spl.h>
00015 #include <clock.h>
00016 #include <thread.h>
00017 #include <current.h>
00018 #include <synch.h>
00019 #include <vm.h>
00020 #include <mainbus.h>
00021 #include <vfs.h>
00022 #include <device.h>
00023 #include <syscall.h>
00024 #include <kern/fcntl.h>
00025 #include <kern/file.h>
00026 #include <uio.h>
00027 
00028 
00029 /* Initialize the open files table */
00030 void init_file_table(struct thread* thread){
00031 
00032         int i;
00033 
00034         for (i=0; i < MAX_FD; i++) {
00035                 thread->table_fd[i] = NULL;
00036         }
00037 
00038 }
00039 
00040 /* Initialize stdin, stdout, stderr */
00041 void set_std_fd(struct thread* thread)
00042 {
00043 
00044         struct vnode* stdin;
00045         struct vnode* stderr;
00046         struct vnode* stdout;
00047         char *console = NULL;
00048 
00049         struct file* new_file_entry;
00050         int result;
00051 
00052         console = kstrdup("con:");
00053 
00054         result = vfs_open(console, O_RDONLY, 0, &stdin);
00055         if (result != 0 ) {
00056                 panic("Unable to attach to stdin: %s\n", strerror(result));
00057         }
00058         kfree(console);
00059 
00060         /* Create a file entry */
00061         new_file_entry = (struct file*) kmalloc(sizeof(struct file));
00062 
00063         KASSERT(new_file_entry != NULL);
00064 
00065         new_file_entry->vfs_node = stdin;
00066         new_file_entry->offset = 0;
00067         new_file_entry->readable = true;
00068         new_file_entry->writeable = false;
00069 
00070         /* Set table_fd[0] to stdin */
00071         thread->table_fd[STDIN_FILENO] = new_file_entry;
00072 
00073         console = kstrdup("con:");
00074         result = vfs_open(console, O_RDWR, 0, &stdout);
00075         if (result != 0 ) {
00076                 panic("Unable to attach to stdout: %s\n", strerror(result));
00077         }
00078         kfree(console);
00079 
00080         /* Create a file entry */
00081         new_file_entry = (struct file*) kmalloc(sizeof(struct file));
00082 
00083         KASSERT(new_file_entry != NULL);
00084 
00085         new_file_entry->vfs_node = stdout;
00086         new_file_entry->offset = 0;
00087         new_file_entry->readable = false;
00088         new_file_entry->writeable = true;
00089 
00090         /* Set table_fd[1] to stdout */
00091         thread->table_fd[STDOUT_FILENO] = new_file_entry;
00092 
00093         console = kstrdup("con:");
00094         result = vfs_open(console, O_WRONLY, 0, &stderr);
00095         if (result != 0 ) {
00096                 panic("Unable to attach to stdin: %s\n", strerror(result));
00097         }
00098         kfree(console);
00099 
00100         /* Create a file entry */
00101         new_file_entry = (struct file*) kmalloc(sizeof(struct file));
00102 
00103         KASSERT(new_file_entry != NULL);
00104 
00105         new_file_entry->vfs_node = stderr;
00106         new_file_entry->offset = 0;
00107         new_file_entry->readable = false;
00108         new_file_entry->writeable = true;
00109 
00110         /* Set table_fd[2] to stderr */
00111         thread->table_fd[STDERR_FILENO] = new_file_entry;
00112 
00113         thread->last_fd = 2;
00114 }
